seed_gold_caps.fact_text: An ultrasound of the right breast on November 3, 2019 revealed a mass at the 2 o'clock position, 11 cm from the nipple in the retroareolar region
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The right breast mass on November 3, 2019 ultrasound measured 0.4 x 2 x 3 cm
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: An ultrasound-guided core needle biopsy of the right breast mass was performed on December 5, 2019
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Pathology from the December 5, 2019 biopsy showed grade 2 ER-positive PR-positive DCIS of the right breast
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had a right breast lumpectomy on January 20, 2020 that removed an 8 mm tumor

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: All five removed lymph nodes were negative for malignancy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's last mammogram was in January 2021 and was normal
